description_long: This obelisk is a cylindrical structure with a smooth, dark surface and a consistent, rounded profile. The sides are subtly indented with a faint, sawtooth-like pattern, giving the silhouette a slightly jagged edge when viewed from certain angles. The top is flat and circular, lacking any pointed or pyramidal tip, which is atypical for traditional obelisks. The material appears to be a dense, polished stone or metal, with a deep, almost black coloration and a faint sheen. There are no visible inscriptions, engravings, or decorative motifs on its surface, emphasizing a minimalist and modern aesthetic. The base is integrated seamlessly with the main body, with no visible steps, platforms, or additional structural elements.
description: A dark, cylindrical obelisk with a smooth, polished surface and subtle jagged edge details, featuring a flat top and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cylindrical shape with a smooth, dark surface and subtle jagged edge details on the sides.
description_view_1: This view highlights the same cylindrical form, with the jagged edge pattern slightly more pronounced on the left side.
description_view_2: The obelisk appears symmetrical, with the jagged edge pattern visible on both sides and a consistent, flat top.
description_view_3: Similar to the front, this view shows the smooth, dark surface and the subtle jagged edge pattern, with lighting slightly different.
attribute_base_design: The base is a simple, flat, circular extension of the main cylindrical body, with no visible steps, platforms, or decorative features.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and circular, matching the diameter of the main body, with no unique features or decorations.
